vllm.title: [KV offload][3/N] Add worker-side CPU support
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds worker-side support for CPU offloading.
It uses the swap_blocks function to perform the actual copying between CPU and GPU.
Supports any cpu_block_size which is divided by gpu_block_size.
Part of the work described in RFC #19854
Depends on #19848

vllm.title: [Frontend] Pass API server count to each process
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Follow-up to #23018.
By passing API server count and rank instead of setting cache size to 0, this PR enables processor caching when API server scale-out is enabled. IPC caching is still disabled for internal LB though since there is no 1:1 relationship between API server and Engine Core pro

vllm.title: Don't skip special tokens with hermes-style tool calling

Some secondary startup error logs have been seen recently due to this.

This is needed for #18465.

The non-adapter pooler is nullified
classifier/score layers with a bias paramater ign

auto_round --model Qwen/Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct --bits 8 --format "auto_gptq" --output_dir /work

vllm.title: [Optimization] Avoid repeated model architecture conversion for pooling models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When running multi-modal pooling models, I found that almost 3% of the time is taken by the get_model_architecture call inside create_processor. Upon inspection, get_model_architecture converts the model class into a pooling model each time it is called which is quite expensive (since it occ

vllm.title: [Hybrid Allocator] Support full attention with different hidden size
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Hybrid allocator requires all layers have the same kv_hidden_size. But some model breaks this assumption, e.g.,

spec decode, the MTP layer and the main model, like #22432
recent native sparse attention like minicpm 4.1. It needs to run attention.0 on a smaller KV cache to select tokens, and
